who: HR managers in mid-size companies using BambooHR, processing 50-100 employee records/month
offer: For HR managers in mid-size companies using BambooHR, processing 50-100 employee records/month, inefficient data analysis causes missed engagement opportunities. We consolidate and analyze HR data instead of manual spreadsheets and disparate HR tools.
problem: Inefficient data analysis leading to poor employee engagement insights.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR managers seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about HR workflows
DM outreach to HR managers with demo video
Participate in community forums for HR tool recommendations
try_it: Let users try data consolidation and basic analytics on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with a clear CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Set default reminder schedules for tasks
Enable CSV import for existing employee data
Provide one-click export for simple reports
